rulings.Case Title: CLEMENCIA PACLIBAR VS. CRESCENT MANOR PARTNERS L.P. et al
rulings.Rulings: Housing Court Law and Motion Calendar for Friday, May 17, 2013, line 1 - DEFENDANT CRESCENT MANOR PARTNERS L.P.'s DEMURRER TO 1ST AMENDED COMPLAINT. Defendant Crescent Manor Partners' Demurrer to First Amended Complaint is OVERRULED. Third and fourth causes of action allege sufficient facts. Deny motion to strike. Any party who contests a tentative ruling must notify the other party of its intent to appear by 4 p.m. =(501/PB)

rulings.Case Title: JUAN ROMAN VS. JP MORGAN CHASE BANK, N.A. et al
rulings.Rulings: Housing Court Law and Motion Calendar for Friday, May 17, 2013, line 2 - DEFENDANT PNMAC MORTGAGE OPPORTUNITY FUND INVESTORS, LLC and MORTGAGE ELECTRONIC REGISTRATION SYSTEMS, INC.'s Motion To Dismiss. Defendants PNMAC Mortgage and MERS' Motion to Dismiss is continued to June 4, 2013 on Court's own motion. Any party who contests a tentative ruling must notify the other party of its intent to appear by 4 p.m. =(501/PB)

rulings.Case Title: EAST WEST BANK AS SUCCESSOR IN INTEREST VS. ATIQUE REHMAM et al
rulings.Calendar Matter: Plaintiff'S Application Appointing Receiver, Order To Show Cause And Temporary Restraining Order
rulings.Rulings: Housing Court Law and Motion Calendar for Friday, May 17, 2013, line 3 - Plaintiff'S order to show cause for Application for Appointment Receiver. Plaintiff's Order to show cause for Application for Appointment of Receiver is GRANTED. No opposition filed. Any party who contests a tentative ruling must notify the other party of its intent to appear by 4 p.m. (501/PB)

rulings.Case Title: AGP 2619 MISSION, LLC VS. LIDIA ZULETA et al
rulings.Rulings: Housing Court Law and Motion Calendar for Friday, May 17, 2013, line 4 - DEFENDANT LIDIA ZULETA's MOTION FOR SUMMARY JUDGMENT. Defendant's Motion for Summary Judgment is continued to May 22, 2013. Opposing party is ordered to comply with SFLR 2.6B and provide courtesy copies of opposition no later than May 17, 2013. Any party who contests a tentative ruling must notify the other party of its intent to appear by 4 p.m. =(501/PB)

rulings.Case Title: MF FUND II LP, VS. ZEDKO MARKOVIC et al
rulings.Rulings: Housing Court Law and Motion Calendar for Friday, May 17, 2013, line 5 - PLAINTIFF MF FUND II LP's MOTION FOR SUMMARY JUDGMENT. Plaintiff's Motion for Summary Judgment is GRANTED. Plaintiff has shifted its burden and Defendant failed to produce any admissible evidence to create a triable issue of fact. Defendant's request for leave to file an amended answer is DENIED, because it is procedurally improper and given the lack of evidence would not change the outcome. Any party who contests a tentative ruling must notify the other party of its intent to appear by 4 p.m. =(501/PB)

Housing Court Law and Motion Calendar for Friday, May 17, 2013, line 6 - DEFENDANT RHONDA FINCH's DEMURRER TO 1ST AMENDED COMPLAINT. Defendants' Demurer to First Amended Complaint is SUSTAINED WITH LEAVE TO AMEND for Plaintiff to attach legible copies of the Lease and amendments. See CCP 1166. Any party who contests a tentative ruling must notify the other party of its intent to appear by 4 p.m. =(501/PB)

rulings.Case Title: 500 LARKIN B8A LLC VS. DEREK WRIGHT et al
rulings.Rulings: Housing Court Law and Motion Calendar for Friday, May 17, 2013, line 7 - PLAINTIFF 500 LARKIN B8A LLC's MOTION FOR SUMMARY JUDGMENT. Plaintiff's Motion for Summary Judgment is DENIED. Triable Issue of Fact re: Fact #4. See Sayed Declaration 6 and Wright Declaration 9. Any party who contests a tentative ruling must notify the other party of its intent to appear by 4 p.m. =(501/PB)

rulings.Case Title: AMY LOUIE et al VS. YAN CI CEN et al
rulings.Calendar Matter: Notice Of Motion To Compel Discovery And Request For Monetary Sanctions Against Pltf
rulings.Rulings: Housing Court Law and Motion Calendar for Friday, May 17, 2013, line 8 - DEFENDANT YAN CEN's Motion To Compel Discovery And Request For Monetary Sanctions Against Plaintiff. Defendant's Motion to Compel Discovery is GRANTED, subject to opposition. Plaintiff shall serve responses by personal service no later than May 17, 2013 5 p.m. No sanctions given defendant has not incurred attorney expenses. Any party who contests a tentative ruling must notify the other party of its intent to appear by 4 p.m. =(501/BP)

rulings.Case Title: KHIN MA VS. JOEL HAMPTON et al
rulings.Calendar Matter: MOTION TO QUASH SERVICE OF SUMMONS OR STAY OR DISMISS
rulings.Rulings: Housing Court Law and Motion Calendar for Friday, May 17, 2013, line 9 - DEFENDANT JOEL HAMPTON's MOTION TO QUASH SERVICE OF SUMMONS OR STAY OR DISMISS. Defendant's Motion to Quash Service of Summons is GRANTED with 5 day leave to amend for Plaintiff to allege in good faith compliance with San Francisco Rent Ordinance 37.9B and 37.9C. Any party who contests a tentative ruling must notify the other party of its intent to appear by 4 p.m. =(501/PB)
